title: psephellus iljinii
intro: Psephellus iljinii, also known as Iljin's scabious, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This perennial herb has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The plant is believed to possess health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Psephellus iljinii include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
